title: Establishment and maintenance of two sand fly colonies (Phlebotomus perniciosus and Phlebotomus papatasi) to implement experimental infections
author: jorian prudhomme
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Detailed protocol and file for the article "Establishment and maintenance of two sand fly colonies ( Phlebotomus   perniciosus  and  Phlebotomus papatasi ) to implement experimental infections" with Appendix A: Detailed protocol for 50% glucose solution preparation, Appendix B: Detailed protocol for sterile dissection of chicken skins., Appendix C: Detailed protocol for larval food preparation, and Appendix D: Detailed file on standardized data collection and tracking of sand fly colonies.
steps_raw: Detailed protocol and file for the article "Establishment and maintenance of two sand fly colonies ( Phlebotomus   perniciosus  and  Phlebotomus papatasi ) to implement experimental infections" with Appendix A: Detailed protocol for 50% glucose solution preparation, Appendix B: Detailed protocol for sterile dissection of chicken skins., Appendix C: Detailed protocol for larval food preparation, and Appendix D: Detailed file on standardized data collection and tracking of sand fly colonies.
